name: add_api_pagination
avoid: do not use OFFSET for large datasets
brief_template:
To add API pagination:
1. Choose strategy: cursor-based (best for large datasets) or offset/limit
2. Add query params: ?cursor=xxx&limit=20 or ?page=1&per_page=20
3. Return envelope: { data, next_cursor, has_more } or { data, page, total_pages }
4. Add default limit (e.g., 20) and max limit (e.g., 100)
5. Support sorting via ?sort=field:asc
6. For cursor: base64-encode last-seen value (id or timestamp)
7. Document pagination in API spec (OpenAPI/Postman)
